title: rosa canina var. flexibilis
intro: Rosa canina var. flexibilis, also known as the flexible dog rose or dog rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina species, a deciduous shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. flexibilis include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rosa canina var. flexibilis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used to make jams, jellies, and other food products that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
